evidence_summary: The docs-only item-4 artifact names `runPipelineElab`, `runPipelineElabChecked`, and the matching internal/public pipeline facades as the authoritative current surfaces, requires reconstruction-visible `TyMu` to `TMu` plus `ERoll` / `EUnroll` continuity on those surfaces rather than solver-only success, binds representative `P2`-`P6` and `N1` / `N2` / `N6` corpus obligations concretely, and stays inside the inherited explicit-only / iso-recursive / non-equi-recursive / non-cyclic-graph / no-fallback boundary without any code, test, Cabal, roadmap, or controller-state changes in scope.
